g.text: Engineered for maximum durability and compression, the CFG
TWPO Piston Kit is the ultimate upgrade for your track-focused
machine. Forged from high-strength aluminum alloy, it
delivers superior heat resistance and reduced friction.
Select your vehicle to confirm compatibility with this part.
Orders placed before 2PM EST ship same day.
We ship to over 100 countries worldwide via DHL Express.
Unused parts can be returned within 30 days. Restocking fee may apply.
"Installed these in my track build and the
compression bump made a significant difference.
Measurements were spot on out of the box.
"For the price point, you can't beat the CFG kit.
